title: NEOM MTR
description: A modpack for everyone and those who use my Minecraft server , it comes with everything you need to join, no hassle, just download and play MTR mod to the fullest
body:
This is a beautiful modpack for my Minecraft server, it includes many popular resource pakc,s optimisations, as well as other mods to give you the most fulfilling experience with Minecraft Transit Railway. It is for my own MTR server, you can also feel free to use it for your own singleplayer worlds as a All in one modpack that has everything you need for starting your own MTR world to be fulfilling and interesting

Some mods include:
1. Extended Block Shapes, for the many different block variants of vanilla blocks that don't exist in vannilla 
2. Mishand Urban Contruction, for realistic roads, as well as custom signs like concrete signs that can be placed anywhere with any text on it including on floors with text of any length and of any fort or size!
3. Minecraft Transit Railway, realistic trains, planes ,and more for automated transportation.
4. Resource packs: Faithful 32x for the best higher resolution minecraft look, the best train resource packs for MTR mod, and the best resourcepacks for glass
5. Yuushya Townscape and Yuushya Modelling, for the untimate realism experience with custom models as well as thebest models of nature and city structures!

I hope you will enjoy this pack, don't forget to join the discord for news as well as acess to my Minecraft Server that runs this pack

DO NOT REDISTRIBUTE AS SOME AUTHORS ONLY WANT THEIR PACKS TO BE FEATURED HERE!
